title: Tender American Roast Prawns
description: A delicious and easy American dish, roasted to perfection and served with a side of your choice. Perfect for a lazy Sunday afternoon, this recipe is gluten-free friendly and packed with flavor.
instructions: Rinse the prawns under cold water and pat them dry with a paper towel.
In a small bowl, mix together the olive oil, salt, black pepper, lemon juice, garlic powder, and paprika.
Add the prawns to the bowl and toss them to coat with the marinade.
Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil or parchment paper and arrange the prawns on it, leaving space between each one.
Dot the top of each prawn with butter.
Roast the prawns in the preheated oven for 8-10 minutes, or until they turn pink and are cooked through.
Remove the prawns from the oven and place them in an ice bath to stop the cooking process.
Once the prawns have cooled, remove them from the ice bath and serve them hot, garnished with chopped parsley.
Serve the prawns with your choice of side dishes, such as rice, vegetables, or salad.
